sources.title: Nurse.Sherri.1978.720p.Blu Ray.x264-X0r
sources.description: A hospital nurse is possessed by an evil spirit, and proceeds to kill off the hospital's patients. The film is also known under such titles as The Possession of Nurse Sherri and Black Voodoo , as well as Beyond the Living , Hospital of Terror , Killer's Curse , and Hands of Death .

metadata.Plot: Horror movie about a demented professor of the occult, whose soul jumps into the curvaceous body of Nurse Sherri (Jill Jacobson) shortly before he dies on the operating table. The possessed lady in white then begins stalking, seducing and kill people - even her boyfriend - until someone puts an end to the madness.
metadata.Writer: Michael Bockman, Greg Tittinger, Al Adamson
metadata.Actors: Geoffrey Land, Jill Jacobson, Marilyn Joi
